summary: Reposted Fox News interview segment. A split-screen shows a studio anchor at left, the Acting ICE Director, a man in a dark suit, as a remote guest center, and field footage labeled 'CHICAGO SEPTEMBER 9' of agents in tactical gear at right. A lower-third reads 'TODD LYONS | ACTING I.C.E. DIRECTOR' and 'PRITZKER (D) ON HOLDING I.C.E. AGENTS ACCOUNTABLE,' with a 'LIVE' tag. The audio is the guest discussing criminal warrants and targeted enforcement in Chicago.

script.scene: Split-screen Fox News interview: anchor at left, Acting ICE Director center, Chicago field footage at right; chyron 'TODD LYONS | ACTING I.C.E. DIRECTOR / PRITZKER (D) ON HOLDING I.C.E. AGENTS ACCOUNTABLE.'
